# Service Policy

What may be offered, and by whom.

- **Refunds**: full refund within 30 days; pro-rata thereafter at agent
  discretion up to one month's value.
- **Discounts**: up to 20% at agent discretion; above that needs a manager.
- **Renewals**: match a competitor quote up to 10% below list, once, with a
  note on the account.
- **Escalation**: any legal, safety, or media-sensitive matter goes to a
  human immediately.
